Verdant Systems

Staff Backend Engineer

Remote - US

Verdant Systems builds infrastructure for climate analytics teams that need reliable data pipelines and fast collaboration tools. We are hiring a Staff Backend Engineer to lead services that process environmental sensor data, partner APIs, and customer workflow events.

You will design TypeScript and Node.js services, own PostgreSQL and Redis data models, build REST and GraphQL APIs, and operate production systems on AWS with Docker and Kubernetes. This is a full-time remote role for engineers who enjoy mentoring teams and making pragmatic architecture choices.

  • Must have 8+ years of experience building backend systems in production.
  • Strong knowledge of TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes is required.
  • Experience with CI/CD, observability, and distributed systems is preferred.

Salary range: $170,000 - $220,000 per year.

Platform Engineer New York, NY
Data Infrastructure Engineer Remote - Canada
